---
title: "UIAO KSI Compliance Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: true
---

```{python}
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

# Path to the evidence bundle JSON (produced by the validator engine)
bundle_path = Path("data/evidence-bundle.json")

if not bundle_path.exists():
    raise FileNotFoundError(f"Evidence bundle not found at {bundle_path}")

bundle = json.loads(bundle_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

summary = bundle.get("summary", {})
ksi_results = bundle.get("ksi_results", [])
generated_at = datetime.fromisoformat(bundle["generated_at"])

status_counts = {
    "pass": 0,
    "fail": 0,
    "error": 0,
    "stale": 0,
}
for res in ksi_results:
    status = res.get("status")
    if status in status_counts:
        status_counts[status] += 1

total_ksis = summary.get("total_ksis", len(ksi_results))
coverage_percentage = summary.get("coverage_percentage", 0.0)

now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
bundle_age = now - generated_at
